build_recipe:
STEP 1: Create base plate — cq.Workplane("XY").box(50, 20, 5)

STEP 2: Cut center bore — .faces(">Z").workplane().circle(5).cutThruAll()

STEP 3: Add raised feature — .workplane(offset=5).rect(40, 15).extrude(3)

STEP 4: Create mounting holes — .faces("<Z").workplane().moveTo(-20, -5).circle(2).extrude(5)
        .faces("<Z").workplane().moveTo(20, -5).circle(2).extrude(5)

STEP 5: Add hinge feature — .faces(">Z").workplane(offset=3).rect(10, 10).extrude(2)

STEP 6: Chamfer edges — .edges("|Z").chamfer(1)
